children.text: The next 30 days will certainly pass by whether you do anything or not. Take up a 30 day fitness challenge and make the maximum out of it. If you are a beginner or just want to shape up your body, the workouts will help you. In 30 days, you will create a new fitness habit and achieve your fitness goal.

The 30 day fitness challenges are ultimate to shape up your body, burn fat and build muscle in short span of 30 days. Whether you are a beginner or a pro, the workouts will suit and challenge you. You can perform the workouts at your home as per your convenience.

We advise not to take up 30 day challenge in case you have any medical condition. If you are suffering from neck or back pain, pregnant or feel uneasy. We will not be responsible for any injuries occur while performing any of the exercises. The exercise guides are just to educate and motivate you. Always stretch before and after exercise to avoid injuries.

30 days is just the right amount of time to take a new habit or break old ones. According to the theory of biorhythms, every one’s body clock has the same cycle of renewal. Our physical body works on a 23-days cycle, our emotional body on a 28-day cycle, and our intellectual body on 33-day cycle. This makes one month an ideal time for self-improvement.
